en_title: God of War Laufey Planned Since 2018, Reveals Star Deborah Ann Woll
cn_title: Woll透露《战神：劳菲》2018年即已规划
subtitle: 瞒了快十年
opus_summary: Deborah Ann Woll透露《战神：劳菲》从2018年计划，导演Cory Barlog展示过立方体海报。游戏与2018年《战神》平行，解答北欧神话谜团。发售日未定。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey, featuring Kratos’ wife Faye as its protagonist, may have come as a surprise to some, but not to its star, Deborah Ann Woll, who first heard about the project almost a decade ago.
paragraphs.cn: 以奎托斯妻子菲为主角的《战神：劳菲》，对部分人来说或许有些意外，但对主演Deborah Ann Woll而言并非如此——她早在差不多十年前就听说过这个项目了。

paragraphs.en: “Oh my God, I can’t tell you. I still pinch myself. I’ve known about this for nearly ten years, and I haven’t been able to talk about it,” revealed Woll in an interview with CGM .
paragraphs.cn: 「天啊，我真的没法形容。我现在还觉得不真实。这件事我知道快十年了，一直都不能说。」Woll在接受CGM采访时透露。

paragraphs.en: The Daredevil actor went on to say that the director of God of War’s 2018 reboot, Cory Barlog, not only told her about this plan way back around the time of that game’s release, but also knew that it would feature one of her sidekicks featured in the reveal trailer: Jack Quaid’s talking Cube.
paragraphs.cn: 这位曾在《夜魔侠》中出演的演员接着说道，《战神》2018年重启版的导演Cory Barlog不仅早在那个游戏发售时就告诉了她这个计划，还知道预告片中会出现她的一位同伴：Jack Quaid配音的会说话的立方体。

paragraphs.en: “He pitched it to me in 2018, and they had known about it before then,” Woll said. “It’s wild. Like when Cory brought me in to talk about doing Ragnarök and show me the 2018 game, he already had a poster for the Laufey game with me and a cube. A cube that’s been there since the beginning. It’s deeply a part of the lore.”
paragraphs.cn: 「他在2018年向我提出了这个构想，而他们在那之前就已经知道了。」Woll说，「这太疯狂了。就像Cory叫我去谈《诸神黄昏》的事，给我看2018年那部游戏时，他已经有了一张《战神：劳菲》的海报，上面是我和一个立方体。那个立方体从一开始就在那里，深深植根于整个传说中。」

paragraphs.en: The upcoming entry into the Santa Monica Studio series certainly provoked a reaction online , not least thanks to the appearance of this gelatinous cube companion. But its director, Ariel Lawrence, has tried to ease concerns, as she said that she “understands” skepticism following the reveal , but hopes fans will give it a chance.
paragraphs.cn: 圣莫妮卡工作室的这个新作确实在网上引发了强烈反响，尤其是这个凝胶状的立方体同伴。不过，导演Ariel Lawrence试图安抚玩家的担忧，她表示自己「理解」公布后的质疑，但希望粉丝能给它一个机会。

paragraphs.en: Of course, some were also disappointed to see Kratos be replaced as the lead character for this God of War chapter, but a new perspective is something Woll is seemingly eager to bring to the mythology. “We need as much diversity as possible within these stories so that we can tell even more stories,” Woll said to CGM. “This is all just about enjoying each other’s perspectives and widening our experiences. If I get to, in some small part, do that for women within gaming, I’m very excited about that.”
paragraphs.cn: 当然，也有人对奎托斯在本作中不再是主角感到失望，但Woll似乎非常渴望为这个神话体系带来新视角。「我们需要在这些故事中尽可能多地展现多样性，这样我们才能讲述更多故事。」Woll对CGM说，「这一切都是为了欣赏彼此的视角，拓宽我们的体验。如果我能在这方面为游戏中的女性尽一份力，哪怕很小，我也无比兴奋。」

paragraphs.en: “It’s this expansion of mythology, this expansion of story,” she adds. “This is, we now know we’re allowed to say, going to run concurrently to 2018. And so all of the mysteries and the little hints and clues, the questions, the lingering, you know, ideas that you have from that Norse saga, we’re going to answer a lot of that, or we’re going to expand upon it. So this is going to feel like you are getting more story. This is going to continue to deepen what we’ve already learned.”
paragraphs.cn: 「这是对神话的扩展，对故事的扩展。」她补充说，「我们现在可以说了，本作的故事将与2018年的那部同步展开。所以所有那些来自北欧传奇的谜团、小暗示、线索、疑问，还有那些萦绕心头的想法，我们都会给出很多答案，或是进一步展开。所以这感觉就像你得到了更多故事，会继续深化我们已经了解的一切。」

paragraphs.en: Woll appears to be only expressing excitement for the project, and appears to have loved every step of the process of becoming Laufey. “I’m willing to say my favourite job I’ve ever had,” she continued. “When I first saw that trailer, my jaw hit the ground. “It’s the first time I’ve been able to experience my work as a viewer without judgment, without self-consciousness, because I knew how much work went into it after me, and that I can just appreciate that, like the technology, but also the animators; they caught every little muscle movement that my face can make.”
paragraphs.cn: Woll对这个项目显然满怀兴奋，也似乎享受成为劳菲的每一步。「我愿意说这是我职业生涯中最棒的工作。」她继续说道，「第一次看到那个预告片时，我下巴都掉地上了。这是我第一次能以观众的身份不带评判、不自觉地观看自己的作品，因为我知道在我之后有多少人付出了努力，我可以纯粹去欣赏——无论是技术，还是动画师；他们捕捉到了我脸上每一丝细微的肌肉变化。」

paragraphs.en: “Kratos is so stoic. I was like, maybe the technology can’t capture little movement, you know, because he doesn’t make a lot of facial movement,” Woll says. “But it’s also just because that’s the character. So it wasn’t sort of utilizing that. So when I watched this one back, I was like, “Oh my God, every single little muscle movement, my eyes, little tiny things that they captured and put in that make a fuller, richer person,” and I couldn’t, I really was blown away.”
paragraphs.cn: 「奎托斯太坚忍了。我当时想，也许技术捕捉不到细微的动作，因为他面部表情变化不多。」Woll说，「但那也是因为那是角色本身的设定，所以没有去利用这方面的技术。所以当我回看这个预告片时，我就在想，『天哪，每一丝肌肉运动，我的眼睛，那些细微的东西他们全捕捉到了，并且放进去，让这个人物更加丰满、更加真实』——我真的被震撼到了。」

paragraphs.en: We still don’t know when we’ll be playing God of War Laufey, but fear not, Kratos fans, there will be more games featuring everyone’s favourite angry Greek god, with Barlog saying that there are “ many more stories to tell. ” For more on Laufey, you can read about why I think this latest God of War is taking the sort of risks I’d like to see more PlayStation series gamble on .
paragraphs.cn: 我们仍不知道何时能玩到《战神：劳菲》，但奎托斯的粉丝不必担心，还有更多游戏正在路上，Barlog就表示「还有许多故事要讲」。
